SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DINAO YNOSTROZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN WENSLEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YNOSTROZA, DINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WENSLEY, RYAN $6,726.68 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,861.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WENSLEY, RYAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT YNOSTROZA, DINO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT WENSLEY, RYAN
